question: Bird flu pandemic before August 2025?
resolution_criteria:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the World Health Organization (WHO) declares H5N1 (bird flu) a pandemic by July 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise this market will resolve to “No”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information form the WHO, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
